title: Strictest test first
problem: Grade a score of 95: 90+ is an A, 80+ a B, 70+ a C, anything lower a D.

trace.note: 95 >= 90 is true, so we take the A branch and skip the rest.
trace.checkpoint_prompt: score is 95 and this ladder tests `>= 90` first. What grade will it land on?

trace.note: grade = 'A'. Order a ladder strictest-first, so the narrowest band gets the first chance to match.
